LanguageData.XiaoTi_SpeedMultiplierDesc: Tick multiplier applied to all objects within {0} cells.
LanguageData.XiaoTi_PawnBoostDescOn: Active: Pawns within range receive additional tick acceleration.\nWARNING: May cause abnormal Pawn behavior. Use with caution!
LanguageData.XiaoTi_PawnBoostDescOff: Disabled: Pawns are not affected by acceleration (default).\nEnable to apply additional tick acceleration to pawns within range.
LanguageData.XiaoTi_PawnBoostEnabledMsg: Pawn boost enabled. May cause abnormal Pawn behavior.
